summary: Issue #428 Ads KPI signals: intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. CTR live via rules_proxy from analytics_weighted_product_ctr; ROAS/CAC unavailable with explicit Promotion vs spend reasons; kpi_catalog workflow routing unchanged. 15/15 contract tests pass. No CRITICAL reliability/security/observability/performance gaps in pure scoring signal paths. Non-blocking intent-review smells and spend-null ROAS/CAC product limitation acknowledged ship-as-is (inherits #426 ETL scope).

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review smell (non-blocking): _compute_roas maps analytics_revenue_denominator None to _PROMOTION_SPEND_UNAVAILABLE_REASON — spend-oriented reason for a revenue gap.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Optional follow-up: split revenue vs spend unavailable reasons when spend ETL lands.
criticalFindings.shipAsIsReason: Revenue denominator absent only when spend path is also blocked in current ETL; behavior tested via spend-unavailable contract tests.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review smell (non-blocking): _compute_cac maps unique_buyers_30d <= 0 to _PROMOTION_SPEND_UNAVAILABLE_REASON — spend reason for buyer-count gap.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Optional follow-up: dedicated buyer-denominator unavailable reason if product copy requires it.
criticalFindings.shipAsIsReason: Buyer count zero is edge case on spend-blocked path; CAC stays unavailable with explicit hint; acceptable for P2 Ads slice.

criticalFindings.description: Product/reliability note: analytics_spend_denominator remains None per #426 ETL scope — ROAS/CAC efficiency KPIs stay unavailable in scoring despite wired live formulas; only CTR emits advisory today.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Wire spend denominator when promotion activity ETL persistence lands; add contract tests for ROAS/CAC rules_proxy happy paths then.
criticalFindings.shipAsIsReason: Explicitly out of scope per #426/#428 MODULE.md and Executor assumption; null policy correct; spend-unavailable reasons tested; no zero fabrication.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review convention note: CTR exposes CTR_RISK/HEALTHY_THRESHOLD constants; ROAS (2.0) and CAC (500_000) remain inline literals.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Extract ROAS/CAC threshold constants on next touch for consistency with CTR.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review convention note: MODULE.md states ROAS/CAC stay unavailable until spend ETL; code also has live rules_proxy paths when denominators exist — spend-gated, not permanent stub.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Doc already updated in this slice; no action required unless spend ETL changes availability semantics.

criticalFindings.description: AC coverage note: ROAS/CAC rules_proxy advisory paths wired in signals.py but untested without analytics_spend_denominator fixture (blocked on spend ETL).
criticalFindings.suggestion: Add happy-path contract tests when spend denominator persistence lands.

interfaceChanges.description: CTR emits rules_proxy advisory from analytics_weighted_product_ctr; ROAS/CAC compute functions replace hardcoded unavailable stubs with spend-gated live paths and explicit unavailable reasons.

mappings.criterion: ctr emit rules_proxy advisory when analytics product ctr present
unavailable with spend reason when promotion partition present
execution layer workflow keys for mid large shop
ctr unavailable when analytics product ctr missing
exit gate ads gap field map report

recommendations: Wire analytics_spend_denominator when promotion spend ETL persistence lands; add ROAS/CAC happy-path contract tests.
Extract ROAS/CAC threshold constants for parity with CTR_RISK/HEALTHY_THRESHOLD.
Consider distinct unavailable reasons for revenue vs buyer denominators when spend ETL arrives.

ownerSignoff.statement: Acknowledged WARNING findings; CTR live path and explicit unavailable reasons verified by contract tests; exit-gate field map documents partial Ads closure.
